why_they_bought: Ran RouteLedger 5.2, an unsupported on-prem dispatch system from a defunct vendor, for over a decade before buying FleetOps specifically to retire it -- the entire onboarding hinges on Dispatch Bridge integration work rather than being incidental to it.
success_criteria: Retire RouteLedger 5.2 as the system of record for dispatch
50% of 50 licensed assets reporting through Live Map by June 28
Stable Dispatch Bridge connection to RouteLedger with no recurring event loss
